payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Top portion of a dark bluish-gray metal fireplace surround with horizontal ridged trim and a rectangular black opening; inner edge shows soot-darkening and a partially visible stone/log hearth at the bottom, crop is partial and edge-cropped (top and sides), approximate camera distance ~1.5 m.
